full_text:
Sample ID: S124_pOmeR

Cell count:

total: 19.9 E6

live: E6

viability: %

size: 6.5 um

Total cell count: 19.8 e6 / ml

! Pre-coat all the wells with omentum-gel:

10 uL for 48-well plates !

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE: 34 wells x 40 µl x = 1360 µl

1500 cells/µl = 2.04E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 680 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 51 µl

cells in medium → 515.4 µl

ome-gel → 96 µl

aprotinin → 2.0 µl

thrombin → 2.0 µl

fibrinogen → 13.6 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

10 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 60 wells

60 wells x 40 µl = 2400 µl,

1500 cells/µl = 3.6E6 cells

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 800 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 60 µl

cells in medium → 606.4 µl

ome-gel → 112.8 µl

aprotinin →2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

total: 19.7 E6

live: E6

viability: %

size: 6.3 um

C) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

10 conditions x 8 wells/condition= 80 wells

72 wells x 10 µl = 800 µl

1500 cells/µl = 1.2 E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 60 µl

cells in medium → 606.4 µl

ome-gel → 112.8 µl

aprotinin →2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

670 µl

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Omegel for the coating:

76 wells x 10 uL = ~800 uL

medium → 667 µl

ome-gel → 113 µl

aprotinin → 2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

Prepare:

Medium

needed 350 uL x 34 = 11.9 mL

42 x 300 uL = 12.6 mL

56 x 150 uL = 8.4 mL

sum ~ 40 mL

Omegel needed ~ 610 uL

aprotinin = 13 uL

thrombin = 13 uL

fibrinogen = 86 uL

Notes from the culturing:

No coating done.

Drug treatments:

Plate 1 and 2

DMSO -control

olaparib 20 uM

pembrolizumab 10 ug / mL

ola + pembro 20 + 10

ATXi 0.5 uM

ola + axl 20 + 0.5

pem + axl 10 + 0.5

ola + pem + axl 20 + 10 + 0.5

Plate layout (48-well plate):

Plate 1: compelete ORG medium

Plate 2: compelete ORG medium + 20% cleared ascites (full speed, 10 min, 4C) to test wether the patient-derived human serum would induce immune cell survival / proliferation

Treatment:

Next day, prepare 7x concentrated drug working solution

Add 50 uL of the drug per 300 uL medium on 48 well plate

Add 25 of the drug per 150 uL medium on 96 well plate

For S124_pOmeR:

x on 48 well plate = x 50 uL = uL

x on 96 well plate = x 25 uL = uL

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2
